files.patch:
@@ -1038,0 +1038,7 @@ + +
allowCompactSourceInstanceMainMethod <true|false> +
Specify whether the "main" action tests in this directory and any subdirectories may use compact +source and instance main methods. If not specified, this property defaults to true. Compact +source and instance main methods is applicable only in Java 25 and higher versions. Setting this +property for test JDK versions lesser than Java 25 plays no role in how jtreg determines the main +method to launch.
